title: DMCA & Disclaimer
content: All games on this website are 'Dumps & demo versions' (Created & free shared from the game lover community), it is not an official release of the game developer. Please buy game from the developer for the best experience.
All games on this website are 'For testing purposes only' (Trial & find bugs to help game developers, to help players rate before deciding to buy game).
All games on this website only can be tested if you voluntarily jailbreak your game console (You should consider carefully).

This Site is in compliance with the Digital Millennium Copyright Act (DMCA). If your copyrighted material has been posted on site and you want this material removed, please send your notices to: pippoexfat@proton.me
